content_sections.heading: Cochin Shipyard Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026 PDF Download Link
content_sections.text: Candidates can download the official CSL Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026 PDF to check complete eligibility, vacancy, and application details before applying. The notification was issued under Reference No. CSL/P&A/RECTT/CONTRACT/Scaffolder Trainee/2026/7 dated 26 June 2026, and includes physical requirement details in Annexure I. content_sections.heading: Cochin Shipyard Scaffolder Trainee Bharti 2026 – Quick Overview
content_sections.text: Candidates searching for the CSL Scaffolder Trainee Vacancy 2026 details can refer to the quick summary below for an instant overview of the post, organization, vacancy count, last date, and application mode.

content_sections.heading: CSL Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026 – Important Dates
content_sections.text: Candidates wondering about the Cochin Shipyard Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026 timeline can note that the online application process starts on 30 June 2026 and closes on 22 July 2026. The notification was officially dated 26 June 2026.

content_sections.heading: Cochin Shipyard Scaffolder Trainee Vacancy 2026 – Category-wise Breakdown
content_sections.text: The CSL Scaffolder Trainee Vacancy 2026 is distributed across UR, OBC, SC, ST, and EWS categories. A total of 60 seats are available, and PwBD candidates are not eligible to apply since the job involves working at heights.

content_sections.heading: CSL Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates checking eligibility for the Cochin Shipyard Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026 should note that the minimum qualification is a pass in X Standard, while the maximum qualification allowed is a pass in XII Standard. Applicants with higher qualifications such as Degree, Diploma, or ITI are not eligible to apply. The upper age limit for the CSL Scaffolder Trainee Bharti 2026 shall not exceed 23 years, meaning applicants must be born on or after 23 July 2003. The minimum qualification must be from a University/Institute/Examination Board recognized by AICTE, appropriate statutory authority, or State/Central Government. Applicants with equivalent qualifications must submit an Equivalency Certificate issued by the competent authority.

content_sections.heading: CSL Scaffolder Trainee Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates applying for the Cochin Shipyard Scaffolder Trainee Apply Online 2026 process must pay the application fee online between 30 June and 22 July 2026. The fee differs by category as shown below. Payment can be made using Debit Card, Credit Card, or Internet Banking only. No other mode of payment, including DD, Challan, or Cheque, shall be accepted.

content_sections.heading: Cochin Shipyard Scaffolder Trainee Salary 2026 – Stipend & Pay
content_sections.text: Candidates wondering about the stipend for the CSL Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026 can refer to the details below. Selected trainees will undergo a three-month training period with a fixed monthly stipend. Successful trainees may be considered for contractual posts at the discretion of CSL, depending on organisational requirements, vacancy availability, and individual performance. Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

content_sections.heading: CSL Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection for the Cochin Shipyard Scaffolder Trainee Bharti 2026 will be through a Physical Test carrying 100 marks. Candidates wondering about the qualifying criteria can note that the minimum pass marks vary by category. Scrutiny of Applications: Shortlisting based on certificates uploaded in the online application. Certificate Verification: Only shortlisted candidates who clear certificate verification will be permitted to attend the Physical Test. Physical Test: 100 marks, scheduled on a later date. Rank List: Prepared based on marks secured in the Physical Test among eligible candidates. The minimum pass mark is 50% for UR and EWS , 45% for OBC , and 40% for SC/ST candidates. CSL may relax the minimum pass mark if the number of qualified candidates is insufficient.

content_sections.heading: Cochin Shipyard Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026 Apply Online
content_sections.text: Candidates eligible for the CSL Scaffolder Trainee Apply Online 2026 process must register through the official website between 30 June 2026 and 22 July 2026. Below are the step-by-step instructions to complete the application. Visit www.cochinshipyard.in and go to the Career page → CSL, Kochi. Go through the User Manual and FAQ published on the website before filling the application. Complete the One Time Registration in the SAP Online portal. Fill in personal, educational, and category details accurately. Upload certificates for age, educational qualification, caste, and a recent passport-size colour photograph. Pay the applicable application fee online (not applicable for SC/ST candidates). Submit the application and ensure the status shows "In process." Retain a soft copy or printout of the application containing the registration number for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Cochin Shipyard Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026 Document Requirements
content_sections.text: Applicants must upload all certificates proving age, educational qualification, caste (if applicable), and a recent passport-size colour photograph at the time of application, failing which the application shall be rejected. Original certificates must be produced at the time of Certificate Verification, along with self-attested copies, failing which candidates shall not be considered for further selection. Applicants belonging to EWS, SC, ST, or OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) categories must produce a valid Income & Asset Certificate or Community Certificate issued by the prescribed competent authority to claim category benefits.

content_sections.heading: Common Mistakes to Avoid in CSL Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Many candidates make avoidable errors while applying for the Cochin Shipyard Scaffolder Trainee Bharti 2026 that can lead to rejection of their application. Applying with higher qualifications like Degree, Diploma, or ITI, which makes the candidate ineligible for this post. Submitting the application without uploading mandatory certificates for age, qualification, or category. Waiting until the last date to apply, which may result in missing technical support after 1600 hrs on 22 July 2026. Submitting more than one application, since the application once submitted is final and cannot be modified. PwBD candidates applying despite the explicit exclusion mentioned in the notification due to the physical nature of the job.

content_sections.heading: CSL Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026 - FAQs
content_sections.text: 1. What is the starting date to apply online for CSL Scaffolder Trainee 2026? Ans: Starting Date to apply online is 30-06-2026. 2. What is the last online apply date for CSL Scaffolder Trainee 2026? Ans: Last online apply date is 22-07-2026. 3. What is the Eligibility to apply for CSL Scaffolder Trainee 2026? Ans: 12TH, 10TH 4. What is the Maximum Age Limit to apply for CSL Scaffolder Trainee 2026 ? Ans: 23 Years 5. How many vacancies are being recruited by CSL Scaffolder Trainee 2026? Ans: Total 60 Vacancies.

faq.question: Q1. Has Cochin Shipyard Limited officially released the Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026 notification?
faq.answer: Yes, CSL released the official notification for Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026 on 26 June 2026 under Reference No. CSL/P&A/RECTT/CONTRACT/Scaffolder Trainee/2026/7.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for CSL Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 22 July 2026.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available in CSL Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 60 total vacancies distributed across UR (24), OBC (21), SC (8), ST (1), and EWS (6) categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for CSL Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The fee is ₹200 (non-refundable, plus bank charges) for UR/OBC/EWS candidates, while SC/ST candidates are exempted from payment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for CSL Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit is 23 years as on 22 July 2026, meaning applicants must be born on or after 23 July 2003, with relaxation of 3 years for OBC and 5 years for SC/ST.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for CSL Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is through a Physical Test carrying 100 marks, preceded by certificate verification of shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the stipend for CSL Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selected trainees will receive a consolidated monthly stipend of ₹10,000 during the three-month training period.

faq.question: Q8. What is the minimum qualification required for CSL Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates need a minimum qualification of pass in X Standard and a maximum qualification of pass in XII Standard; higher qualifications like Degree, Diploma, or ITI are not eligible.

faq.question: Q9. How can candidates apply for CSL Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through www.cochinshipyard.in under the Career page (CSL, Kochi) from 30 June 2026 to 22 July 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Can Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) apply for CSL Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, PwBD candidates are not eligible to apply since the job involves working at heights and materials handling, which poses serious risk.
